scripts.title: Market Recap: Moderna, Apple, Tesla Moves
scripts.hook: Moderna jumped over ten percent today!

beats.vo: Moderna climbed over 10% after Jim Cramer expressed confidence, stating he likes having a position in the stock.
beats.caption: Moderna +10% on Cramer boost

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Tesla shares fell nearly 7.5% after Barclays reiterated a cautious "Equalweight" rating, citing concerns around robotaxi and Optimus developments.
beats.caption: Tesla -7.5% on cautious outlook

beats.vo: Apple rose almost 5% on plans for a major iPhone lineup expansion between late 2026 and early 2027, including its first foldable iPhone.
beats.caption: Apple +5% on foldable iPhone plans

beats.vo: And Arm Holdings dropped nearly 6.6%, pulling back from recent peaks, despite reports of its robust licensing business driving AI-fueled growth.
beats.caption: Arm -6.6% pulls back from peak

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna soared, Tesla dipped, and Apple pushed higher with foldable iPhone plans. Get the full market rundown here!

scripts.title: Moderna Surges: What's Driving the Biotech Rally?
scripts.hook: Moderna surged over 10% today, capping off a remarkable run!

beats.vo: Moderna, ticker MRNA, climbed more than 10% today, now trading at $79.76 a share, extending a significant rally that began last month.
beats.caption: Moderna Jumps +10.01%

beats.vo: This recent momentum follows a unanimous 9-0 FDA vote which has helped push the biotech stock up over 70% in just the last month, reigniting investor interest.
beats.caption: FDA Vote Powers MRNA

beats.vo: This robust performance comes as some Wall Street analysts hold an average price target suggesting the stock could fall by 44% from current levels. However, even Jim Cramer has noted he now likes having a position in Moderna after years of skepticism.
beats.caption: Analysts Diverge on MRNA

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna (MRNA) is on a roll, up 10% today and over 70% this month! Find out what's behind the biotech's surge, and why some analysts are still cautious. #Moderna #MRNA #StockMarket #Biotech #FDA #Investing

scripts.title: Market Movers: Moderna Jumps, Tesla Dips
scripts.hook: Moderna jumped over 10% today – let's break down the market's biggest moves.

beats.vo: Moderna jumped over 10% after Jim Cramer voiced his confidence, with investor sentiment also boosted as oil prices dipped to pre-Iran war levels.
beats.caption: Moderna jumps 10%+

beats.vo: Meanwhile, Tesla fell almost 7.5% today. This came as Barclays reiterated a cautious Equalweight rating on the stock, citing concerns around its robotaxi and Optimus developments.
beats.caption: Tesla drops on analyst caution

beats.vo: Apple climbed nearly 5%, driven by news of its plans for a significant expansion of its iPhone lineup, including its first foldable model, anticipated in late 2026.
beats.caption: Apple plans foldable iPhone

beats.vo: And Netflix was up almost 4.7%, following reports highlighting its robust cash-generating business model compared to competitors in the streaming space.
beats.caption: Netflix cash flow strong

scripts.disclaimer: For information only — not financial advice.
scripts.fbCaption: Moderna, Tesla, Apple, and Netflix made big moves today. Here's why.
